Skvěle chutná jako horký nápoj v chladných dnech, ale i jako ledový čaj v létě – s několika kostkami ledu a plátkem citronu se promění v dokonale osvěžující letní drink. Chuť je vyvážená, s jemně sladkými tóny ovoce a výrazným citrusovým závěrem, který zanechává příjemný pocit svěžesti. Každý sáček je jednotlivě zabalen v ochranné fólii Teavelope, která uchovává aroma, čerstvost a plnost chuti.    SloženíJablečné výlisky, regulátor kyselosti: kyselina citrónová, jablečná, sladké ostružinové lístky, kořen čekanky, aroma (konc. citrónová šťáva), slupky šípku, citrónová kůra, citrónová tráva. The food vacuum cleaner is a device that will be appreciated by every person who cares about extending the freshness of products up to 5 times longer. It is ideal for both dry and wet products. Vacuum-packed products are healthier and have less access to bacteria. The operation of the vacuum welding machine is very simple. Its basic function is to draw air inside the foil bag and thus vacuum the food products. Such packaging extends the life and shelf life of food. Most fresh vegetables can be kept in the fridge for about 5 days, but vacuum-packed vegetables can be extended to 20 days. The same applies to meat. Normally they can be stored for a maximum of 2-3 days. They will keep fresh for 9 days when vacuum packed. Hermetically sealed meat can be stored in the freezer for up to two years. The extra flat shape leaves plenty of room for the tongue and promotes the natural sucking reflex. The extra thin and narrow design of the NUK soother minimises pressure on the jaw and developing teeth. The disc of the pacifier is shaped with delicate cutouts in the shape of stars and drops to allow air to circulate around the mouth. These holes help prevent irritation of sensitive baby skin. items.raw_desc: Elosztó aljzat ARCTIC Case Fan Hub:        The ARCTIC Case Fan Hub serves as a hub for fans. The hub allows you to connect up to 10 PWM fans and connects to the board with a single cable. PWM synchronization on the Arctic hub is formed according to the 1st fan and the power supply is via SATA.             Key features of the ARCTIC Case Fan HubARCTIC Case Fan Hub is a hub for fansPossibility to connect up to 10 PWMPower is supplied from a source using SATA
